meta.description: Sends a Telegram alert whenever a Razorpay payment is captured. Perfect for Indian SMBs to get instant payment notifications. Setup: 1) Add your Telegram Bot credentials 2) Replace YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with your chat ID 3) Set webhook URL in Razorpay dashboard to your n8n webhook URL
meta.author: Mehul Jhabak - github.com/mehul82099
